title: grammitis polita
intro: Grammitis polita, also known as the smooth lip fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The medicinal properties of Grammitis polita include its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, and it has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Grammitis polita include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
